title: Windows support: .exe, hotkeys, permissions, icons, bundle, docs
description:
Windows support backlog items:
1. find_voice_typer_path() + .exe suffix (partially done in Bead 1.2)
2. Hotkey selector: hide Fn/Cmd on Windows, show Win/Alt
3. Permissions modal: hide on Windows (not needed)
4. .ico icon for Windows
5. [bundle.windows] in tauri.conf.json
6. Documentation for Windows build setup
7. Windows CI integration test
